mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment(recipe_id, content, member_id, rating) VALUES(#{recipeId}, #{content}, #{memberId}, #{rating})
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.content, c.recipe_id, c.member_id, c.rating, c.status, c.created_date, m.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.recipe_id = #{recipe_id} ORDER BY c.comment_id
